a.xlink:title: Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.
Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.
Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.
Counts occurrences of a substring in a string.
Retrieves the names of datasets available in the currently open HDF5 file.
Ends the current I/O session, closing any open files.
Checks if a string contains a specific substring.
Starts an I/O session, opening a file for reading or writing.
Static callback function for H5Literate, used to iterate over objects in an HDF5 file.
Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.
Checks if a path refers to an existing file.
